com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter

Interface IXPropertyFilter<O extends IXObject>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXEvaluator, IXFilter

    public interface IXPropertyFilter<O extends IXObject>
extends IXFilter
    All custom property filters will implement this interface. Object filter plugin (IXEvaluation) implementer will return a set of filters which can contain object of type IXPropertyFilter. It will be used by the application to filter out properties

    Sample usage of the implementation class: 

          Sample filter to filter out the device pin properties for pin with name GND
                public class DevicePinPropertyFilter implements IXObjectPropertyFilter<IXLibraryDevicePin>{
                        public Collection<IXValue> include(IXLibraryDevicePin pin, Collection<IXValue> values)
                        {
                                //Special processing for device pin property filtering
                                if(pin.getAttribute(IXAttributes.DomainName).equals("GND")){
                                        return Collections.empty_list();
                                }
                           else{
                 return values;
                           }
          }
                };
    See Also:
    IXFilter, IXEvaluation

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Collection<IXValue> apply(O candidateObject, java.util.Collection<IXValue> properties)
      This API is automatically called by the application (like Capital Library) to filter properties.

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        java.util.Collection<IXValue> apply(O candidateObject,
                                    java.util.Collection<IXValue> properties)
        This API is automatically called by the application (like Capital Library) to filter properties. It can be used to filter out properties.E.g. it can be used to filter properties in Capital Library import or export.
        Parameters:
        candidateObject - - the object whose properties are considered for filtering
        properties - - the properties considered for filtering. Name and value of the property is available in IXValue
        Returns:
        a filtered collection. Properties which are in input properties but not there in this list will be filtered out
